title: VPN fails after certificate update

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] VPN fails for multiple users after certificate update
servicenow_seed.description: Several remote users cannot connect to corporate VPN since this morning. Client returns 'certificate not trusted' error.

correct_steps: Verify caller and capture exact error and VPN client version
Confirm scope by checking related incidents (multiple users)
Test reachability of the VPN gateway from a wired connection
Capture certificate fingerprint and expiry from the client
Link related tickets to a parent and escalate to Network Operations
rationale: A 'certificate not trusted' error spike across multiple users after a cert change is a fleet-wide gateway issue, not per-user.
hints: If the same error appears across users, do not troubleshoot each client.
Check for a recent certificate or gateway change.
learning_objectives: Recognize fleet-wide VPN failures from per-user reports
Capture VPN client version and certificate evidence

tool_clues.vpn_logs: Gateway VPN-GATEWAY-01 reissued certificate at 06:00. 47 client failures since 06:05.
